_readme: Provisional recipe (deliverable rendered, look not user-approved). Tracks GENERIC except the pins below.

notes.satu: 0.35/0.5 ladders were run for the SMC's OIII and NOT adopted — satu stays generic 0.2
notes.sep_engine: generic (auto -> net when weights installed). The recorded 2026-07-08 deliverable used inpaint; a net re-render is a declared delta on an unapproved look.
